nasb.text: But from there you will seek the Lord your God, and you will find Him if you search for Him with all your heart and all your soul.

esv.text: But from there you will seek the Lord your God and you will find him, if you search after him with all your heart and with all your soul.

cnv.text: 但你們在那裡必尋求耶和華你的　神；如果你一心一意尋找他，就必尋見。

ccb.text: 但你们若在那里寻求你们的上帝耶和华，全心全意地寻求祂，就必寻见。
